text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the dance<n>studio...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
H-hiya guys! ♪ Your one and only El<n>is back in
action! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...No, it's missing something! I need alittle more oomph! Like I'mbringing the world right to yourdoorstep!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh. So you're hopping on that whole<n>"world"
shtick too, eh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ack! Who's there?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just you, Golshi. What are<n>you doing
here?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? I'm here because<n>you're
throwing the word "world"<n>around like it's a sack
of potatoes!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
H-how am I throwing it around?! I'm<n>serious
about aiming to be the<n>world's strongest! I mean
it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The world's strongest, huh? Not sure<n>about that
one.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You talk the talk, but I don't see a lot<n>of walking. I
sense hesitation. You're<n>lost.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: W-well...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's got you rackin' your brains,<n>hm? Lay it
on me! You afraid of the<n>world?! HUH?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No! If I'm running, I'm not losing!<n>Doesn't matter
where in the world or<n>with who! But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My performances are nothing like<n>Pearl's... So I
started thinking just<n>maybe, they're not
world-class yet...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, cut that out. You're acting like<n>a piece of
grilled fish at the<n>supermarket—letting someone
else do<n>all the cooking.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're nothing like Pearl? Or the<n>others? Gimme
that spatula so I can<n>flip you out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Nobody else matters! You've gotta<n>bring out your
own flavors! Spice<n>yourself up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: M-my own flavors?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right! What you're lacking is<n>your own
unique flavor! Give me<n>some umami! Sprinkle on
those bonito<n>flakes!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there! Yeah, the trainer<n>secretly
watching us from the<n>shadows! You agree with
me, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect to be thrown into the<n>spotlight
suddenly. What should I say<n>here...
choice_data_list: Yeah, you need some original flavor!
Yeah, you need some original flavor!
No, it's all down to the recipe!
No, it's all down to the recipe!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect to be thrown into the<n>spotlight
suddenly. What should I say<n>here...
choice_data_list: Yeah, you need some original flavor!
Yeah, you need some original flavor!
No, it's all down to the recipe!
No, it's all down to the recipe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Original flavor...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You might have a point... In wanting to<n>be like
someone else, I lost sight of<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If anything, I should be showeringeveryone in my colors! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna reflect on myself and find<n>my own
way of doing things!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Heh, now you get it. What do you<n>think
crustaceans use their pincers<n>for? To crab their
dreams.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I should know what my own<n>flavors are.
What makes me unique...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...is how I pack the heat! I've got<n>passion, spunk,
and vitality!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If the recipe I'm using doesn't show<n>off those
flavors, what's the point?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, I need to come up with a<n>performance
that's really all about<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I like that spark in your eyes...<n>You better
come back as the king of<n>the deep seas one of
these days.
